info.name: 02 - Refund Async Success Or Failure
info.description: Asynchronous refund (Stripe answers PENDING, resolved later via the /info?refreshRefunds=true poll). Success: override create->pending -> approve (legs PENDING) -> override GET->succeeded -> poll -> legs SETTLED. [AsyncFail]: same setup -> override GET->failed -> poll -> request FAILED + provisional legs VOIDED.

exec: var envType = pm.environment.get('envType'); var msu = pm.environment.get('mockServerUrl') || ''; var url = pm.request.url.toString();
if (envType && envType !== 'Local' && msu && url.indexOf(msu) > -1) { if (pm.execution && typeof pm.execution.skipRequest === 'function') pm.execution.skipRequest(); }
// Dynamic refund amounts derived from the real ride's charged amount T (captured by 00).
// rf1 = T/2 (primary), rf2 = T/4 (secondary/partial-2), rf3 = T/2 (04 over-cap: > remaining T/4).

item.name: Gate: latest COMPLETED booking for fixed rider (run 00 first)

exec: var d = {}; try { d = pm.response.json(); } catch(e) {}
var b = completed.length ? completed[0] : (list.length ? list[0] : null);
pm.test('Run 00 first — fixed rider has a completed booking', function () {
pm.expect(b != null, 'no completed booking for the fixed rider; run 00 (StripeRideFlow) first').to.eql(true);
if (b) { pm.environment.set('customer_bookingId', b.id); console.log('Gate: booking ' + b.id + ' status ' + b.status); }

item.name: Capture BAP ride id (SQL — poll until drained)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('BAP ride row drained (run 00 first)', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no ride for booking; run 00').to.be.above(0); }); return; }
// NOTE: r.id is the RIDE id. orderId is a SEPARATE payment_order GUID, captured next via domain_entity_id.

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Capture payment order short id + intent (SQL — poll until drained)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('payment_order row present', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no payment_order for ride').to.be.above(0); }); return; }
pm.test('order has a Stripe payment intent (pi_)', function(){ pm.expect(/^pi_/.test(String(o.payment_service_order_id))).to.eql(true); });

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Capture CHARGED transaction amount T (SQL — poll until captured)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('a CHARGED payment_transaction exists (refund cap source)', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no CHARGED txn after polling (charge settles after End Ride)').to.be.above(0); }); return; }
pm.test('a CHARGED payment_transaction exists (refund cap source)', function(){ pm.expect(rows.length).to.be.above(0); });

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Capture BPP booking id + commission (SQL — poll until drained)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('BPP ride row drained', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no BPP ride for id; KV not drained').to.be.above(0); }); return; }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Wait for BAP fare invoice drained (refund-invoice source)

exec: if(!rows.length){ pm.test('BAP fare invoice drained (refund-invoice source)', function(){ pm.expect(0,'fare invoice not drained for ride').to.be.above(0); }); return; }
pm.test('BAP fare invoice drained (refund-invoice source)', function(){ pm.expect(rows.length).to.be.above(0); });

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Finalize refund env (riderToken alias + sanity gate)

exec: // 01-05 raise refunds as the customer via {{riderToken}}
pm.test('sanity: T captured and positive', function () { pm.expect(T).to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('sanity: all refund ids captured', function () {
console.log('Refund env ready. T =', T, pm.environment.get('txn_currency'), '| commission =', pm.environment.get('bpp_commission'));
// Dynamic refund amounts from the captured charged amount T (self-contained: computed here,
// AFTER capture, since T is now produced within THIS run — not carried from a prior collection).

item.name: Reset refund state for the ride (clean start)

exec: pm.test('BAP dashboard switch OK', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); });
pm.test('OPEN captured', function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.count).to.be.above(0); pm.environment.set('refundRequestId', d.rows[0].id); });

pm.test('approve accepted (not FAILED)', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.status).to.not.eql('FAILED'); });

item.name: Assert BAP legs PENDING + capture re_

exec: function _log(rows){ try { console.log('  ↳ DB rows:', JSON.stringify(rows.map(function(x){return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount, total:x.total_amount, type:(x.reference_type||x.invoice_type||undefined)};}))); } catch(e){} }

function _assert(rows){ _log(rows); pm.test('B4 leg PENDING', function(){ pm.expect(rows.filter(function(r){return r.status==='PENDING';}).length, 'expected a PENDING provisional leg after async approve').to.be.above(0); });  }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }

pm.test('re_ captured', function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.count).to.be.above(0); var re = d.rows[0].id_assigned_by_service_provider; pm.environment.set('refundReId', re); pm.expect(/^re_/.test(String(re||'')), 'expected a re_ id, got: '+re).to.be.true; });

item.name: Assert BAP legs now SETTLED + clear override

exec: function _log(rows){ try { console.log('  ↳ DB rows:', JSON.stringify(rows.map(function(x){return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount, total:x.total_amount, type:(x.reference_type||x.invoice_type||undefined)};}))); } catch(e){} }

function _assert(rows){ _log(rows); pm.test('B4 leg SETTLED after poll', function(){ pm.expect(rows.filter(function(r){return r.status==='SETTLED';}).length, 'expected SETTLED after succeeded poll').to.be.above(0); }); pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/override', method:'DELETE' }, function(){}); }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }

item.name: Assert BPP legs SETTLED (P2 — refundLedger fired on poll-success)

exec: function _log(rows){ try { console.log('  ↳ DB rows:', JSON.stringify(rows.map(function(x){return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount, total:x.total_amount, type:(x.reference_type||x.invoice_type||undefined)};}))); } catch(e){} }

function _assert(rows){ _log(rows); pm.test('P2 BPP refund legs SETTLED after poll', function(){ pm.expect(rows.filter(function(r){return r.status==='SETTLED';}).length, 'expected BPP SETTLED legs after poll').to.be.above(0); });  }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }
pm.test('2nd OPEN captured', function () { var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.count).to.be.above(0); pm.environment.set('refundRequestId', d.rows[0].id); });

pm.test('approve accepted (not FAILED yet)', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); var d = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(d.status).to.not.eql('FAILED'); });

item.name: [AsyncFail] Capture the new re_ (non-success refunds row)
[AsyncFail] Assert request FAILED after poll (SQL — after drain)

exec: function _log(rows){ try { console.log('  ↳ DB rows:', JSON.stringify(rows.map(function(x){return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount, total:x.total_amount, type:(x.reference_type||x.invoice_type||undefined)};}))); } catch(e){} }

function _assert(rows){ _log(rows); pm.test('GET->failed poll leaves the request FAILED', function(){ pm.expect(rows.length, 'refund_request not drained').to.be.above(0); pm.expect(rows[0].status, 'async GET->failed should set the request FAILED').to.eql('FAILED'); });  }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }

item.name: [AsyncFail] Assert provisional legs VOIDED (SQL) + clear override

exec: function _log(rows){ try { console.log('  ↳ DB rows:', JSON.stringify(rows.map(function(x){return {st:x.status, amt:x.amount, total:x.total_amount, type:(x.reference_type||x.invoice_type||undefined)};}))); } catch(e){} }

function _assert(rows){ _log(rows); console.log('  ↳ ride ledger statuses:', rows.map(function(r){return r.status;}).join(',')); pm.test('async-failed refund VOIDED its provisional leg(s)', function(){ pm.expect(rows.filter(function(r){return r.status==='VOIDED';}).length, 'expected a VOIDED provisional leg').to.be.above(0); }); pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/override', method:'DELETE' }, function(){}); }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }
